decision: Install sidecar policy bindings, active invocation gate, fixtures, smoke test, and active invariant; no authority export.
synthesis: Mass-editing 242 legacy files is broad and regression-prone for one bounded stage.
A sidecar binding + active gate closes the audit queue by making every candidate governed at invocation time.
True source-code retrofits can now proceed by priority under the gate rather than leaving unbounded direct invocation open.
